paragraphs.text: 今天爸爸给我买了一盒新积木。积木有各种形状：有长方形的、正方形的、三角形的。
paragraphs.translation: Today Dad bought me a new box of building blocks. The blocks come in various shapes: rectangular, square, triangular.

paragraphs.text: 我用积木搭了一座高高的城堡。城堡有城门和塔楼，还有一堵围墙。
paragraphs.translation: I built a tall castle with the blocks. The castle had a gate, towers, and a surrounding wall.

paragraphs.text: 弟弟也想玩，不小心碰倒了我搭的城堡。虽然有点难过，但我没有生气，我们一起重新搭了一个更大的。
paragraphs.translation: My brother wanted to play too and accidentally knocked down my castle. Although I was a bit upset, I didn't get angry. We built an even bigger one together.
